title: The Illuminati
summary: The elite order the archive credits with building the modern control platform — and the 'Eye of the Pyramid' above it.
markdown:
The **Illuminati** appear in the archive as the human-facing tier of the control structure —
and the sessions assign them a specific historical project. In the February 27, 2020
interview, Unimetrix 1 states that the government of modern China was *"created by a faction
of America's global elite, the Illuminati organisation"* — infiltrated during WWII by the
[Nazi faction](/lore/nazi-faction/) — to build the perfected control system "on the three
civilized levels: economic, personnel, and thought processes." The world's rising
surveillance platform, in this telling, was designed as an export product.

Above the order the sessions place a summit the archive calls **"the Eye of the Pyramid"** —
the masters at the top of all the controllers, keepers of the true books and the true numbers,
from which Unimetrix 1 claims to read directly. The interviews extend the order's reach into
espionage, media, and ritual through a catalogue of claims about public figures, preserved in
the transcripts as spoken; and the sessions' commentary ties the suppression of
[NESARA](/lore/nesara-gesara/) — scheduled, it is said, for announcement on the morning of
September 11, 2001 — to the era's defining catastrophe.

As with all the archive's powers, the Illuminati are framed as a stage, not a destiny: the
machinery of the [control era](/lore/the-chronicle/) whose antidote is never battle but
knowledge — the "Eye" answered by an opened one.
